name: Customer Success
tagline: Retention is the real growth engine

coreMetrics.name: Churn Rate
coreMetrics.description: Percentage of customers lost per month

coreMetrics.name: NPS
coreMetrics.description: Net Promoter Score from customer surveys

coreMetrics.name: Time to First Value
coreMetrics.description: Days from signup to first measurable outcome for the customer

coreMetrics.name: Expansion Revenue
coreMetrics.description: Revenue from upsells and cross-sells to existing customers

coreMetrics.name: Support Response Time
coreMetrics.description: Median time to first response on support tickets

weeklyRhythm.activity: Churn risk review — check at-risk accounts and plan interventions
NPS review — scan recent scores and comments for action items

monthlyRhythm.deliverable: Churn report with reasons and prevention patterns
Onboarding completion rates and drop-off points
Updated health scores across customer base
List of customers ready for upsell or cross-sell conversations
